titleStmt.title: SII 26.210: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 210. (A.R. No. 198 of 1909.) AVANĀSHI, AVANASHI TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up near the Kalyāṇa-maṇḍapa in the same temple.

This inscription records a gift of 3 paṇam, made by a certain Oṉṉakkaḷachcheṭṭiyār, son of Nandagaṇacheṭṭiyār, one of the merchants of Emmaṟkāl in Teṉakkaḍambai-nāḍu for food-offerings daily during the mid-day worship to the deity Avināśi-iliṅgaṉ in Dakshiṇa-Vārāṇasi. It is stated that the amount of 3 paṇam was the monthly interest of 15 poṉ lent by the donor to some persons including Tānikar Āvaḍaiya Nambiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastajagadādhipatiyappa śrīkailā
sanivāsa pārvvatiprāṇanātha Ellādevaraval
labhan dakṣaṇavārāṇaci Avināśi Iliṅ
kaṉukku śrīviranañcarāya Uṭaiyaṟku cel
lā niṉṟa cālivāhana cakaṟaṉ yāṇṭu
Āyirattunāṉūṟṟuoruppattu Oṉpatu
kku mel piṅkaḷa varuṣam kāttikai mātu mula
teṉakkaṭampai nāṭṭu Emmaṟkālattu
ceṭṭikaḷil nan=takaṇa ceṭṭiyār ma
kaṉ Oṉṉakkaḷac ceṭṭiyār dhammaśā
saṉam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi Iṉṉā
yanāṟku nāḷ Oṉṟukku mattiyāṉa Ava
caram Oṉṟukku naṭakkum naivetti
yak kaṭṭaḷai Arici paṭi ṁ2 paruppu
paṭi ṁ(1/4)ṁ vaḻutilaṅkāy ṁ1ṁ ney
collakai ṁ(1/4)ṁ viḷaiyat
tu pākku ṁ4ṁ veṟṟilai ṁ5ṁ
tipam ṁ1ṁ Immaruvāti naṭattu
m paṭikku mātam ṁ1ṁkku mu
ṉṟu paṇamāka ttānikar Ā
vaṭaiya nampiyār Avaṉāci
yappaṉ kaṇṭi Appaṉ Avi
ṉāci paṇṭitar vacam kaṭaṉā
kak kuṭutta Ippo
ṉ patinañcukkum vaṭṭi
mātam ṁ1ṁkku mu
ṉṟu Inta vaṭṭip paṇam
paṇattile Immaruvā
ti naivettiyak kaṭṭaḷai tānikarku
ṅ koṇṭu kovil patintavaṉ
cantirātittiyavarai naṭattivarak
kaṭavārkaḷākavum Inta taṉmattu
kku Ahitam paṇṇinavarkaḷ ke
ṅkaik karaiyile kārām pacu
vaik koṉṟa pāvattile pokak
kaṭavārkaḷākavum
Ippaṭikku tānikar Āvaṭaiya nam
piyāraviṉāci Appaṉ taṇṭi Appan
Aviṉāci paṇṭitaṉ Ivarkaḷ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku cātaṉappaṭi tiru Aviṉāci
k kaṇakku timmaiyaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku meluṭai verku naḷḷa
yil Ākayaṇi Atikāri Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku kovil Uṭkaṇa
kku Amaippiccār Eḻuttu
melṉāṭṭu ti mulat
koṭṭikaḷil pa ṉce
llappiḷḷai Eḻuttu kāmaṇ
Digital edition of SII 26.210 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
